info.title: TeamPass REST API
info.description: Collaborative password manager REST API. Authenticate via POST /authorize (login + password + apikey) or POST /authorizeToken (OAuth2 Personal Access Token), then pass the returned JWT as 'Authorization: Bearer <jwt>'. Errors use the RFC 9457 application/problem+json envelope; the legacy 'error' member is kept for backward compatibility.

servers.description: Legacy unversioned base path (treated as v1)

post.summary: Get a JWT from login + password + API key
Get a JWT from a Personal Access Token (OAuth2/SSO users)

post.description: Flags the api_sessions row matching the token's jti as revoked — the JWT is then rejected on every endpoint until it expires. Legacy tokens without a session row invalidate the user's single legacy API session instead.

get.summary: Get item(s) by id, label or description
get.description: Exactly one of 'id', 'label' or 'description' is required. 'label' and 'description' lookups are searches: they accept 'like', 'limit' and 'offset' and return X-Total-Count.

get.summary: Get items contained in a list of folders

parameters.name: folders
parameters.description: Comma-separated or JSON array of folder ids

200.description: Items in the requested folders (empty array when none)

get.summary: Get the current TOTP code of an item

post.description: All listed fields must be present, even if empty.

Location.description: Path-absolute reference of the created resource (item/get?id=N)

put.description: Requires 'id' plus at least one updatable field (label, password, description, login, email, url, tags, anyone_can_modify, icon, folder_id, totp, fields).

get.summary: List the folder tree accessible to the user
get.description: Returns a hierarchical tree. Pagination ('offset'/'limit') applies to the root-level entries; X-Total-Count is the total number of root entries.

200.description: Folder tree (empty array when the user has no accessible folder)

get.summary: List accessible folders with read-only flag
get.description: Historical name — returns ALL accessible folders; check 'is_readonly' on each entry.

201.description: Folder created (no Location header: the API has no folder get-by-id endpoint yet; the body carries newId)

200.description: User list (sensitive columns are never returned)

post.summary: Get browser extension connection settings (POST variant)

X-Total-Count.description: Total number of matching entries before pagination

Problem.description: RFC 9457 problem details; the legacy 'error' member duplicates 'detail' for backward compatibility.

MethodNotAllowed.description: HTTP method not supported for this endpoint (Allow header lists supported methods)

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded (api_rate_limit_per_minute, per user and per IP)

HttpsRequired.description: Request rejected because api_require_https is enabled and the request was sent over plain HTTP
